title: Why you must plan for a 30-year retirement
summary: Longer lifespans and shorter careers mean affluent Indians must plan for a 30-year retirement, not 15—requiring disciplined investing, diversified income and strong health coverage.

title: Should you buy home loan insurance? How it works and where to buy
summary: Home loan insurance is structurally similar to a term life insurance policy. In the unfortunate event of the borrower’s death during the policy tenure, the sum assured is paid to the nominee or lender, and this amount can be used to repay the outstanding home loan.
